messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: On it. Primary DB CPU jumped from 18% to 99% within 12 minutes of deploy. Checking recent changes.

messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: ProductService.get_by_id() is called once per order item in a Python for-loop, i.... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
